title: Fix Z-Index Conflict Between Tooltips and Metrics Analyst Sidebar
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want tooltips to display above all other UI elements including the Metrics Analyst sidebar, so that tooltip content is always readable.
description: Tooltips were rendering behind the Metrics Analyst sidebar due to a z-index stacking conflict. The sidebar's z-index was higher than the tooltip's, causing the tooltip content to be obscured.
acceptance_criteria: Tooltips render above the Metrics Analyst sidebar
Z-index stacking order is correct for tooltips across all views
No other UI elements are negatively affected by the z-index fix
ux_changes: Fixed z-index stacking order so tooltips render above the Metrics Analyst sidebar.
implementation_notes: CSS z-index adjustment for tooltips to ensure they stack above the sidebar component.
comment_summary: Developer fixed the z-index issue directly on production.
